description:
Chie-sensei is contacted by Nana and heads to the Ebisumori residence with Kaya.
Source: Crunchyroll

titles.title: Mama no Ouchi wa Kowakunai / Imouto wa Kowakunai? / Ebisumori-ke wa Kowakunai?
Mommy`s House Isn`t Scary / Little Sisters Aren`t Scary? / The Ebisumori Family Isn`t Scary?
ママのお家はコワくない / 妹はコワくない? / 戎杜家はコワくない?
